en.extract:
The beach kingfisher (Todiramphus saurophagus) is a species of bird in the family Alcedinidae. It is found in Indonesia, Papua New Guinea, and Solomon Islands. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical mangrove forests.

The '''beach kingfisher''' ('''''Todiramphus saurophagus''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Alcedinidae]]. It is found in [[Indonesia]], [[Papua New Guinea]], and [[Solomon Islands]]. Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical mangrove [[forest]]s.

zh.extract:
白頭翡翠（學名：Todiramphus saurophagus）是翠鳥科領翡翠屬的一種鳥類，分布於印尼、巴布亞新幾內亞及所羅門群島。其自然棲息地為亞熱帶或熱帶紅樹林。
